title: Prefer Unicode-aware versions of character classes
description: When using POSIX classes without the UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS flag or when using hard-coded character classes, letters outside of the ASCII range won't be matched. This may cause incorrect handling of non-ASCII input. To correctly handle non-ASCII input, it is recommended to use Unicode classes.
recommendation: Use Unicode classes or enable Unicode support for POSIX classes

checks.message: Use Unicode classes or enable Unicode support for POSIX classes
